title: Add git availability checks to session-start.sh and user-prompt-submit.sh
description: Add `command -v git` checks before invoking git in hooks. Currently missing checks allow silent failures if git is unavailable, breaking hook execution and session initialization.
acceptance_criteria: session-start.sh checks git availability before line 20-28 git operations
user-prompt-submit.sh (Python section) validates git exists before subprocess calls
Fallback behavior defined: skip operation or log warning if git unavailable
Tested with git removed from PATH (PATH=/usr/bin test acceptable)
